    Namespace Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Transforms

    Classes

    InstancingTransform

    Matrix4x4Factory

    MorphTransform

    Projection

    Utility class to calculate camera matrices

    RigidTransform

    SkinnedTransform

    Structs

    AffineTransform

    Represents an affine transform in 3D space, with two mutually exclusive representantions:

    • As a 4x3 Matrix. When IsMatrix is true.
      Publicly exposed as Matrix.
    • As a Scale/Rotation/Translation chain. When IsSRT is true.
      Publicly exposed as: Scale, Rotation, Translation.

    Matrix4x4Double

    SparseWeight8

    Represents a sparse collection of non zero weight values, with a maximum of 8 weights.

    Interfaces

    IGeometryTransform

    Interface for a vertex transform object
